title: Auto-producer: deterministic project-fact detector + fact retrieval into context
description: Make facts populate without manual CLI and feed planning. A deterministic detector reads manifests/config and writes project facts (testCommand, buildCommand, packageManager, framework) through reconcile at runPipeline and chat-session start. A retrieveRelevantFacts + bounded serializer inject scope-isolated active facts into planner/curator context, mirroring the lessons path. No LLM is used to produce facts — only reconcile's ambiguity branch may.

successCriteria.description: The project builds (`npm run build`, exit 0) and typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`, zero errors).

src/orchestrator/memory/fact-detector.ts exports a pure detectProjectFacts(projectInputs) that maps a parsed package.json / bober.config.json into Fact drafts (e.g. project/testCommand, project/buildCommand, project/packageManager, project/framework) with NO fs read and NO LLM inside the pure fn (inputs are passed in).

A unit test runs the detector against a fixture project (package.json with scripts) and asserts the expected facts are produced; a second test writes them through reconcile twice and asserts no duplication (unchanged → NOOP, changed → supersede).

The detector is invoked (and its facts reconciled into .bober/memory/facts.db) near the start of runPipeline (src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts) and in the chat session startup path (src/chat/chat-session.ts), guarded so a facts failure never aborts the run.

retrieveRelevantFacts(projectRoot, scope, keywords) returns scope-isolated ACTIVE facts ranked deterministically, and serializeFactsForContext(records, { charBudget }) returns a bounded, char-capped block; both covered by unit tests (including scope isolation: facts in scope A never surface for scope B).
ESLint reports zero errors on new and modified files (`npm run lint`).

generatorNotes: DETECTOR: src/orchestrator/memory/fact-detector.ts must be PURE — detectProjectFacts takes already-parsed inputs (e.g. { packageJson, boberConfig }) and returns Fact drafts; the fs reads happen in a thin caller, not the pure fn (mirror how distill is pure and the CLI does IO). Map deterministically: scripts.test→project/testCommand, scripts.build→project/buildCommand, presence of package-lock.json/yarn.lock/pnpm-lock→project/packageManager, deps for react/next/vue→project/framework. Use scope='' (default/programming team) via the namespace convention. WIRING: at the start of runPipeline (src/orchestrator/pipeline.ts:1017) read package.json + bober.config.json, call detectProjectFacts, open the FactStore, and write each draft via writeFact/reconcileFact (Sprint 2) with now stamped here. Wrap the whole block in try/catch that logs a warning and continues — fact production must NEVER abort a pipeline run. Do the same in the chat session startup (src/chat/chat-session.ts, near where buildMemoryDistill is called around line 234). RETRIEVAL: add src/orchestrator/memory/fact-retrieve.ts with retrieveRelevantFacts(projectRoot, scope, keywords, {topK}) that opens the store, gets active facts for the scope, and ranks by deterministic token overlap (reuse the tokenize/scoreRecord pattern from retrieve.ts), plus serializeFactsForContext mirroring serializeLessonsForPlanner (header + one line per fact + hard charBudget slice). Inject the serialized facts block into the planner/curator context next to the lessons block (find where serializeLessonsForPlanner output is assembled and add the facts block alongside it, scope-keyed). Keep retrieval pure beyond the single store read. Tests: fixture project for the detector; in-memory store for retrieval + scope-isolation; reconcile-idempotency test reusing Sprint 2.
evaluatorNotes: Run build, typecheck, and `npm test -- fact-detector fact-retrieve`. For sc-5-2: read fact-detector.ts and confirm detectProjectFacts takes parsed inputs (no readFile/fs, no createClient inside the pure fn). For sc-5-3: run the detector test and confirm the expected project facts; confirm the double-reconcile test shows one active fact per predicate after two runs (NOOP on unchanged, supersede on changed). For sc-5-4: read pipeline.ts and chat-session.ts and confirm the detector+reconcile block is present near startup AND wrapped in try/catch so a thrown facts error is swallowed with a warning (trace that the run continues). Best-effort: run a real `bober run`/chat in a temp project and confirm .bober/memory/facts.db contains project/testCommand and project/buildCommand active; if a full run is impractical, verify by code inspection + a focused integration test. For sc-5-5: confirm retrieveRelevantFacts only returns t_invalidated IS NULL rows for the requested scope and NEVER returns another scope's facts; confirm serializeFactsForContext respects charBudget (output length <= budget). Confirm no LLM is invoked anywhere in the production path (the only LLM is reconcile's ambiguity branch from Sprint 2).
